page.content: The first table presents various metrics across studies on DDFS, with the headers including Process (μm), Core area (mm²), Maximum sampling rate (MHz), Power consumption (mW), SFDR (dBc), SNR (dB), Output resolution (bit), and Tuning latency (clock). The row labeled "Kang and Swartzlander, 2006 [23]" shows values of 0.13, 0.35, 1018, 0.343, 90, —, 17, and — respectively. For "Sharma et al., 2009 [26]", the metrics are —, —, 230, —, 54, —, 10, and —. The row for "Jafari et al., 2005 [17]" lists 0.5, —, 106, —, —, —, 14, and 33. For "Ashrafi and Adhami, 2007 [18]", the values are 0.35, —, 210, 112, 72.2, 67, 12, and —.
